# Dealer Suite 360
> Dealer Suite 360 (dealersuite360.com) is the all-in-one dealership operating system for RV dealers across North America.

Dealer Suite 360 provides a comprehensive SaaS platform combining AI-powered warranty claims processing with a full suite of dealership revenue services including F&I, financing, parts management, digital marketing, consignment, on-site repairs, roadside assistance, a dealer-to-dealer network marketplace, and monthly live auctions open to the public.

## Who We Serve
- RV dealerships (primary audience) — dealers looking to outsource warranty claims processing
- Dealers seeking to grow revenue through F&I, financing, parts, and marketing services
- Dealers wanting to buy or sell RV inventory through a verified network marketplace
- General public looking to purchase RVs at wholesale prices through live auctions
- RV owners seeking extended warranty, roadside assistance, and protection plans

## Core Services

### Claims Processing (Live — Module 1)
- A-Z Warranty Claims Processing: DAF (Dealer Authorization Form), PDI (Pre-Delivery Inspection), Warranty, Extended Warranty, Insurance
- Supported manufacturers: Jayco, Forest River, Heartland, Columbia NW, Keystone, Midwest Auto
- Covers all 10 RV types: Travel Trailer, Fifth Wheel, Class A, Class C, Van Camper, Small Trailer, Pop Up, Toy Hauler, Truck Camper, Destination Trailer
- AI-powered FRC code lookup, photo quality scoring, and claim readiness scoring
- Patent-pending technology platform

### Financial Services (Q2 2026)
- Financing Services: lender integration, approval optimization, bilingual compliance
- F&I (Finance & Insurance) Outsourcing: loan origination, GAP insurance, extended warranty sales, AI F&I Presenter (video avatar technology)
- Warranty & Extended Service Plans: OEM and aftermarket plan management, three plan tiers (Basic, Plus, Premium)

### Revenue Growth Services (Q3 2026)
- Digital Marketing & Lead Generation: SEO, PPC, social media campaigns, CRM integration
- Parts & Accessories Management: inventory optimization, sourcing network, installation services
- On-Site Repairs: technician dispatched to dealership, service call + hourly billing
- Consignment & Trade-In Programs: professional appraisal, revenue share model
- Revenue Optimization: labor and parts revenue maximization

### Marketplace & Auctions (Q3–Q4 2026)
- Network Marketplace: dealer-to-dealer RV inventory listings, 24/7 access, $250 flat commission per unit sold, Dealer Suite 360 acts as escrow
- Live Auctions: monthly public auctions running 48 hours, bidder account required, $250 refundable deposit per unit bid (deducted from purchase price if won, returned if lost)

### Consumer Direct Services (Q4 2026)
- Roadside Assistance: 24/7 emergency towing and roadside support, available as dealer add-on for customers
- Extended Warranty: direct-purchase protection plans for RV owners
- RV Protection Packages: paint, fabric, and interior protection plans

## Pricing
- Plan A (Starter): $299/month — core claims processing subscription
- Plan B (Professional): $599/month — full-service tier with expanded modules
- Plan C (Enterprise): custom pricing for multi-location dealer groups
- Marketplace Membership: $499/year
- Live Auction Access: $99/month or $899/year
- Network Marketplace Commission: $250 flat fee per completed unit sale
- Live Auction Bidder Deposit: $250 per unit bid (fully refundable if not won)
- Claim processing fees: available by contract and through dealer portal

## Technology
- AI-powered FRC Lookup Engine for manufacturer-specific repair codes
- Photo Quality Gatekeeper for claim photo analysis (operator side)
- Claim Readiness Score (0–100% confidence before submission)
- Document Scanner with OCR for correspondence auto-population
- Denial Prediction engine based on historical claim patterns
- Invoice Matcher for parts-to-claim-line reconciliation
- AI F&I Presenter (Tavus/D-ID video avatar for remote product presentations)
- Bilingual platform: English and French (Canadian market)
- Three-portal system: Operator Portal, Dealer Portal, Customer Portal

## Business Model
- Two-sided SaaS platform: dealers subscribe, operator team delivers services
- Revenue: monthly subscriptions + per-claim fees + marketplace commissions + auction fees + F&I referral fees + financing origination fees + marketing retainers
- Target market: ~7,400 RV dealerships across North America (~$56B combined industry revenue)

## Brand Architecture
- Dealer Suite 360 (dealersuite360.com) — primary platform brand serving North America
- RVClaims.ca — white-label deployment for the Canadian market (powered by Dealer Suite 360)

## Contact
- Phone: 888-443-2204
- Email: support@dealersuite360.com
- Website: https://dealersuite360.com
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Languages: English, French

## Pages

### Core Pages
- / — Home: full platform overview with all 16 sections
- /about — About Dealer Suite 360: company story, team, mission
- /services — Full service ecosystem: all 16+ services across 5 categories
- /pricing — Subscription plans, per-claim fees, marketplace pricing
- /sign-up — Dealer registration and access request form
- /contact — Contact, support, and demo booking
- /book-demo — Schedule a live product demonstration

### Claims & Coverage
- /claims-processing — A-Z warranty claims processing (DAF, PDI, Warranty, Extended Warranty, Insurance)
- /rv-types — All 10 RV types covered with manufacturer support details

### Financial Services (Q2 2026)
- /financing — Dealership financing support and lender integration
- /fi-services — F&I outsourcing with AI F&I Presenter technology
- /warranty-plans — OEM and aftermarket warranty plan management

### Revenue Growth Services (Q3 2026)
- /revenue-services — Revenue growth services overview
- /revenue-optimization — Labor and parts revenue maximization
- /marketing-services — Digital marketing, SEO, PPC, social media
- /parts-components — Parts and accessories management
- /consignment-services — Trade-in and consignment programs
- /on-site-repairs — Mobile technician dispatch service
- /technology — AI platform and technology features

### Consumer Direct Services (Q4 2026)
- /roadside-assistance — 24/7 emergency towing and roadside support
- /extended-warranty — Direct extended warranty for RV owners
- /protection-plans — Paint, fabric, and interior protection

### Marketplace & Auctions
- /marketplace — Marketplace hub: Network Marketplace + Live Auctions
- /network-marketplace — Dealer-to-dealer RV inventory marketplace
- /live-auctions — Monthly 48-hour public auctions at wholesale pricing

### Dealer Directory
- /dealers — Verified RV dealer directory with listings and claims history

### Resources

- /industry-reports — RV industry market data, claim trends, and revenue benchmarks

- /dealer-training — Structured onboarding and certification programs
- /news — Industry news, platform updates, and RV market insights
- /blog — Educational blog: warranty tips, claim strategies, dealership management

- /dealer-integration — DMS integration guides (IDS-Astra, EverLogic, Lightspeed)
- /expert-consultation — One-on-one sessions with claims and platform specialists

- /careers — Open positions and company culture
- /partnerships — Manufacturer, lender, and technology partner programs

- /cookie-policy — Cookie use policy
